metadata.title: Civil Aircraft Unified Source Registry v1.7
metadata.model: One canonical source record with zero or more official local-PDF attachments in localAttachments[]. Related legacy/supplementary PDFs are attached to the current source record instead of appearing as duplicate archive cards.
metadata.integrity: 25/25 local PDF attachments retain the v1.6-validated SHA-256, byte size and page count.
